creator: akw24542@eoopy.com
text:
The developer of rsync generally said --crtimes do not support because BSD cannot set the birth value into any value of an existing file.

More information here:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=254354
https://github.com/WayneD/rsync/issues/166#issuecomment-812968810
